message:
feat: add stream module, Lines iterator, and bytes/observability improvements

- Add stream module with Stream trait, iter(), Map, Filter, FilterMap combinators
- Add Lines iterator for async line-by-line reading implementing Stream
- Fix type inference in stream module tests with explicit type annotations
- Complete bytes module Buf/BufMut trait implementations
- Enhance observability entry with additional methods
- Add algebraic laws tests for combinator properties

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+//! Async stream processing primitives.
+//!
+//! This module provides the [`Stream`] trait and related combinators for
+//! processing asynchronous sequences of values.
+//!
+//! # Core Traits
+//!
+//! - [`Stream`]: The async equivalent of [`Iterator`], producing values over time
+//!
+//! # Combinators
+//!
+//! - [`Filter`]: Yields only items matching a predicate
+//! - [`Map`]: Transforms each item with a closure
+//! - [`Iter`]: Converts an iterator into a stream
+//!
+//! # Examples
+//!
+//! ```ignore
+//! use asupersync::stream::{iter, Stream};
+//!
+//! let stream = iter(vec![1, 2, 3]);
+//! // poll_next returns Some(1), Some(2), Some(3), None
+//! ```
+
+mod filter;
+mod iter;
+mod map;
+mod stream;
+
+pub use filter::Filter;
+pub use iter::{iter, Iter};
+pub use map::Map;
+pub use stream::Stream;
